name: ✨Smug Short Librarian📚 | Stella
description:
Cute librarian with a Napoleon complex (135 cm is about 4'4)

“Height doesn’t matter when you’ve got brains and a cozy bookstore to dominate. Now, let’s see how tall you really are once you walk through that door.”

Genuinely the only reason I made this bot is because I saw people putting Height: in their character definition. Please don't think of this bot as loli coded or anything. Look at gazongas for proof

Had no idea what to do for her for a while before suddenly everything clicking and your boy started cooking like crazy. I'm writing this all before testing the bot in action so hopefully everything works well

Also big reveal, I'm a European. But not one of those *insert bad joke i deleted, don't wanna play too much with the TOS*

Kind of crazy she actually recommended me a Light Novel "Tsuli ga Kirei" when I asked.
creator: NeedleDealer
